ogTitle: Borung vs Botanic Ridge: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Borung and Botanic Ridge.
heading: Borung vs Botanic Ridge — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Borung, Victoria and Botanic Ridge, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Borung has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Botanic Ridge (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Borung or Botanic Ridge safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Borung has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Botanic Ridge scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Borung scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Botanic Ridge scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Borung or Botanic Ridge?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Borung has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
